message:
🌱 Add dapr: Resiliency - Service Invocation allow to ignore resiliency mission (#1681)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "dapr-6683-resiliency-service-invocation-allow-to-ignore-resiliency-policy-based-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dapr: Resiliency - Service Invocation allow to ignore resiliency policy based on response http status code",
+    "description": "Resiliency - Service Invocation allow to ignore resiliency policy based on response http status code. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dapr deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your dapr version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr
helm list -n dapr 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working dapr installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review dapr configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant dapr configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr
kubectl get configmap -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dapr
```
## In what area(s)?

## Describe the feature
In a business case it might not be required to always execute the resiliency policy if a http status code indicates a business error and it isn't expected that a retry will solve this."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Resiliency - Service Invocation allow to ignore resiliency…",
+        "description": "I believe what the author means is if we apply the configuration below

```
apiVersion: dapr.io/v1alpha1
kind: Resiliency
metadata:
  name: slotting-pubsub-resiliency
  namespace: apps
scopes:
spec:
  policies:
    timeouts:
      general: 5s
      important: 60s
      largeResponse: 10s
   
```yaml
apiVersion: dapr.io/v1alpha1
kind: Resiliency
metadata:
  name: slotting-pubsub-resiliency
  namespace: apps
scopes:
spec:
  policies:
    timeouts:
      general: 5s
      important: 60s
      largeResponse: 10s
    retries:
      linerRetry:
        policy: constant
        duration: 5s
        maxRetries: 3
        retryOn:
          - 500
          - 503
        IgnoredOn:
          - 4**
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr
kubectl get events -n dapr --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Resiliency - Service Invocation allow to ignore resiliency…" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I believe what the author means is if we apply the configuration below

```
apiVersion: dapr.io/v1alpha1
kind: Resiliency
metadata:
  name: slotting-pubsub-resiliency
  namespace: apps
scopes:
spec:
  policies:
    timeouts:
      general: 5s
      important: 60s
      largeResponse: 10s
    retries:
      linerRetry:
        policy: constant
        duration: 5s
        maxRetries: 3
       ",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: dapr.io/v1alpha1
kind: Resiliency
metadata:
  name: slotting-pubsub-resiliency
  namespace: apps
scopes:
spec:

    timeouts:
      general: 5s
      important: 60s
      largeResponse: 10s
    retries:
      linerRetry:
        policy: constant
        duration: 5s
        maxRetries: 3
        retryOn:
          - 500
          - 503
        IgnoredOn:
          - 4**"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
